tipRules.tip: Robertson: Throw a lipless bait in grass during prespawn on Chickamauga — pair it with a big swimbait for a two-pronged offshore prespawn approach.

knowledge.insight: Robertson: Wind equalizes fishing pressure on Tennessee River lakes — the only thing that overcomes heavy pressure is weather. Root for it to blow hard.
Robertson: During prespawn, a cold snap slowing fish from spawning keeps them in the offshore staging pattern longer, which benefits offshore anglers.
